sidebar.subtitle: Design systems, agentic development and product focus.
sidebar.degreeCore: Core: Java, Python, JS, SQL, Android & Cloud Computing.

automind.h1: Drive the frontend of the next generation of AUTOLOAD, a modular SaaS product built from the ground up in Next.js 14, React 18 and TypeScript on a .NET 8 backend (SignalR, multi-tenant PostgreSQL), replacing the legacy on-premise .NET + Vue system and cutting new-client install time by 70%.
automind.h2: Cut the frontend build pipeline from 12 to 4 minutes by fixing a Node + Tailwind CSS misconfiguration, speeding up the team's deploy cycle by 3x.
automind.h3: Created and maintain @automind/react-components, a design system built on Radix UI, Storybook and Chromatic that standardizes the UI across 2 products and eliminated component rewrites between frontend teams.
automind.h4: Implemented Vitest and Playwright in the Azure DevOps pipeline with full coverage of critical flows (unit + E2E), preventing regressions before release via smoke tests on PR and full regression in CI.
automind.h5: Run daily code reviews, mentor ~5 junior developers and lead Claude Code adoption across Automind engineering at the request of tech leadership, embedding the agent into design system refactors, specs and tests for ~3x faster delivery.
automind.h6: Mentored the developer who built AUTOLOAD's end-to-end RAG pipeline, the product's first AI feature: Llama embeddings via HuggingFace, ChromaDB vector store and GPT-powered response generation on a Python backend.

branddi.h1: Architected an end-to-end brand protection platform that serves 300+ global brands across three fronts (brand bidding, fraudulent sites and domains, and pirated products on marketplaces), with a NestJS/REST core integrated with Pipefy via GraphQL.
branddi.h2: Cut report dashboard response times from 7 minutes to milliseconds with server-side downsampling, streamed responses and lazy-loaded time series.
branddi.h3: Implemented real-time processing of around 6M sponsored ads per month with Go workers on RabbitMQ that consume crawled data across the brand bidding and pirated product fronts, feeding the detection pipeline for unfair competition and pirate listings on marketplaces.
branddi.h4: Built the observability stack from scratch (Papertrail, health checks, downtime alerts) and cut failure-to-fix time to near-zero, with the team notified at the moment of each incident.
branddi.h5: Led code reviews and defined the unit testing strategy for an 8-analyst team, and automated AWS deploys via GitHub Actions to standardize the project's CI/CD flow.

eisa.h1: Automated the E2E test suite for VIVO systems (90M+ subscribers) in Selenium WebDriver, Cucumber and Ruby, with coverage of critical provisioning flows and full regression before each release.
eisa.h2: Validated asynchronous flows in Apache Kafka and ran complex PL/SQL (Oracle) scripts on Linux to isolate bugs in data pipelines that affected billing.
eisa.h3: Led the migration of the legacy monorepo from TortoiseSVN to GitLab, moving around 20 engineers onto a modern version-control workflow and enabling CI/CD pipelines.

parallel.h1: Built full-stack features in React and Node.js for a sales platform, focused on UX and funnel conversion improvements.
parallel.h2: Created auxiliary Python APIs and managed MySQL data persistence for internal product workflows.

skills.title: Technical Skills
skills.agentSkillsDesc: Modular skills for generative agents, each one self-contained with docs, rules and references.
skills.wigDesc: Personalized feed with geo + affinity scoring, Redis caching and cron-driven push notifications. Stripe subscriptions, Supabase Auth with RLS, rate limiting via proxy and standalone PWA.
skills.jacosegDesc: Conversion-focused landing page with responsive web design. Internal dashboard with Prisma + PostgreSQL multi-branch, NextAuth with RBAC, server actions with Zod validation and drag-and-drop tables.
skills.biancaDesc: Custom landing page with serif typography, Framer Motion animations and a layout designed to convey warmth. Firebase Auth, reCAPTCHA-protected form and email delivery via Nodemailer.
skills.portfolioDesc: SSG with ISR, Server Components with Suspense and resilient fetching (Promise.allSettled + timeout). Build-time PDF CV, open source via GitHub API, command palette (cmdk), theme toggle with View Transitions API and SoundCloud player via Widget API.

tools.title: Tools

intro.title: Pick a tool
intro.body: Choose a tool from the sidebar. Everything runs in your browser.

jwt.title: JWT Decoder
jwt.description: Decode header and payload of a JSON Web Token.

base64.title: Base64
base64.description: Encode and decode text and files in Base64.
base64.dropZone: Drop a file here or click to select

image.title: Image → Base64
image.description: Convert an image to a base64 data URI with ready-to-paste HTML/CSS snippets.
image.dropZone: Drop an image or click to select

url.title: URL Encoder
url.modeComponentHint: encodeURIComponent — encodes everything (use for query values)

hash.title: SHA Hash
hash.description: Generate SHA-1, SHA-256 and SHA-512 from text. Runs via Web Crypto.

password.title: Password Generator
password.description: Passwords and tokens with cryptographic randomness.
password.noCharset: Pick at least one character set.

timestamp.title: Timestamp Converter
timestamp.description: Convert between Unix, ISO 8601 and human-readable formats.

color.title: Color Converter
color.description: Convert between HEX, RGB, HSL and OKLCH with preview.

case.title: Case Converter
case.description: Convert text between camelCase, snake_case, kebab-case, PascalCase and others.

json-yaml.title: JSON ↔ YAML
json-yaml.description: Convert between JSON and YAML in both directions.

regex.title: Regex Tester
regex.description: Test regex patterns against text. Shows matches, capture groups and replace preview.

cron.title: Cron Parser
cron.description: Translate cron expressions to human-readable description and upcoming runs.

diff.title: Text Diff
diff.description: Compare two versions of text and see what changed line by line.

person.title: Person Generator
person.description: Fake person data with valid CPF (check-digit verified).

address.title: Address Generator
address.description: Fake Brazilian addresses with formatted CEP.

company.title: Company Generator
company.description: Fake company data with valid CNPJ (check-digit verified).

lorem.title: Lorem Ipsum
lorem.description: Generate placeholder text — words, sentences or paragraphs.

slug.title: Slugify
slug.description: Convert text into URL slug (strip diacritics, normalize separator).

qrcode.title: QR Code Generator
qrcode.description: Generate a QR code from text or URL. Download as SVG or PNG.
qrcode.levelHint: L: low · M: medium · Q: high · H: max
